scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: Wake Forest says scores are only required if you indicate in your application that you want them considered; it accepts self-reported SAT/ACT scores during review and superscores multiple test dates.

claims.claim: Wake Forest says scores are only required if applicants indicate in the application that they want them considered; the university accepts self-reported SAT/ACT scores and superscores multiple test dates.
